title: Hollywood Round-Up
writer: Joseph Hoffman, Monroe Shaff, Ethel La Blanche
actors: Buck Jones, Helen Twelvetrees, Grant Withers
plot: One of three films made by Columbia circa 1936-37 based on behind-the-scenes film making with a "western" setting ("The Cowboy Star", "Hollywood Round-up" and "It Happened in Hollywood"), plus RKO weighed in the same year with Geo...
